org.apache.flink.table.store.mapred

Class TableStoreInputFormat

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.apache.paimon.hive.mapred.PaimonInputFormat
      • org.apache.flink.table.store.mapred.TableStoreInputFormat
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    org.apache.hadoop.mapred.InputFormat<Void,RowDataContainer>
    Deprecated.

    @Deprecated
public class TableStoreInputFormat
extends PaimonInputFormat
    A PaimonInputFormat to be compatible to table store 0.3.
